name: St. Nicholas School
message: St. Nicholas School is an international school in Sao Paulo, Brazil, with two campuses: in Pinheiros and Alfaville districts. Founded in 1980 by Mrs. Kirsten, the school strives to provide high-quality education in a welcoming environment. It offers International Baccalaureate (IB) programs at all levels of study, including elementary, secondary school, and graduate programs. The school's goal is to educate students with critical thinking, creativity and global responsibility, preparing them for success in the modern world.https://stnicholas.com.br/
